## Mock-only Confirmation

- [ ] I confirm this issue contains only fictional mock data.
- [ ] I did not include real WeChat chats, real Git data, real recordings, real company names, real person names, real project names, real amounts, real addresses, real phone numbers, or identifiable case details.
- [ ] I did not paste private evidence, screenshots, transcripts, source code, or service delivery material.

## Problem

Describe the bug.

## Reproduction Steps

Use a fictional mock package or describe mock-only steps.

## Mock Input Used

Link to a repository file or paste a minimal fictional snippet.

Do not paste real evidence.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what happened.

## Local Checks

Paste relevant output from:

```powershell
python scripts/check_all.py
```

Use only mock-only output.
